Tutorials

HTML Basics

According to a 2026 study, 67% of developers use semantic HTML. Research by W3C shows this improves accessibility by 40%. "Semantic HTML is the foundation of web accessibility" — Jane Smith, W3C, 2026.

This is a paragraph with more content to ensure sufficient word count for testing purposes. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This sentence contains enough words to fill up the space and make the content longer than the minimum threshold for our tests. We need to reach at least 600 words to pass the content quality check.
